title: Original Visual Direction Set
attribution: Original AI-generated concept imagery commissioned for this repository. It is reference material only; do not represent it as third-party photography or use it to reproduce another brand.

visual_traits.purpose: Compare distinct art directions before selecting a project-specific visual system.
visual_traits.usage_rule: Extract hierarchy, density, palette roles and material cues; do not copy protected marks, copy or visual identity.

accessibility_notes: Direction images are supplementary and must receive meaningful text alternatives or be decorative.
No direction relies on color alone to convey product state.
A selected direction must still be tested in responsive, keyboard and reduced-motion states.
